clinical_history: The patient complains of lower back pain for two weeks, worsened by prolonged sitting and improved with gentle movement. No radiation to the legs or red flag symptoms reported.

detailed_findings.finding: Mechanical pattern of low back pain
No leg weakness, numbness, or bladder/bowel dysfunction
detailed_findings.explanation: Reduces suspicion for cauda equina syndrome.

impression_summary: Likely mechanical low back pain without red flag features.
recommendations: Recommend gentle physical activity and core-strengthening exercises.
Short-term use of analgesics as needed.
Advise to seek urgent care if red flag symptoms develop.
